title: A Study to Assess BMS-986458 Alone and in Combination With Anti-lymphoma Agents in Relapsed/Refractory Non-Hodgkin Lymphomas

eligibility.text: Participants ≥ 18 years of age with frontline or R/R NHL.
eligibility.justification: This criterion defines a specific patient population, ensuring feasibility in recruitment and data collection.

eligibility.text: Participant must have measurable disease (defined by at least one FDG-avid lesion for FDG-avid disease and one bi-dimensionally measurable disease on cross sectional imaging by computed tomography or magnetic resonance imaging with at least one lesion > 1.5 cm in the transverse diameter).
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures a sufficient sample size for detecting treatment effects.

eligibility.text: Participants must accept and follow pregnancy prevention plan.
eligibility.justification: This criterion prioritizes patient safety by ensuring informed consent regarding potential risks to pregnancy.

eligibility.text: Participants must not have an Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status ≥ 2.
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures the patient's ability to tolerate treatment and participate in the study.

eligibility.text: Participants with an inability to comply with listed restrictions, precautions and prohibited treatments.
eligibility.justification: This criterion addresses potential non-compliance issues that could impact data quality or patient safety.

eligibility.text: Participants must not have prior CAR-T, or radiotherapy ≤ 4 weeks, systemic anticancer treatment ≤ 5 half-lives or 4 weeks, allogeneic SCT ≤ 6 months (only applicable to BMS-986458 single agent or rituximab combination cohorts), or autologous SCT ≤ 3 months prior to study intervention initiation.
eligibility.justification: This criterion prioritizes patient safety by excluding individuals with a history of specific treatments that could pose risks during the trial.

eligibility.text: In BMS-986458 + T-cell engager combination cohorts: Participants must not have prior alloSCT or solid organ transplantation, history of confirmed progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy (PML); known or suspected history of hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH); known or suspected chronic active Epstein-Barr (EBV) infection.
eligibility.justification: This criterion prioritizes patient safety by excluding individuals with a history of specific conditions that could pose risks during the trial.

eligibility.text: Participants must not have any condition, including significant acute or chronic medical illness, active or uncontrolled infection, or the presence of laboratory abnormalities, that places participants at unacceptable risk if participating in this study.
eligibility.justification: This criterion prioritizes patient safety by excluding individuals with a history of specific conditions that could pose risks during the trial.

eligibility.text: Participants must not have known or suspected central nervous system involvement.
eligibility.justification: This criterion prioritizes patient safety by excluding individuals with a history of specific conditions that could pose risks during the trial.
This criterion acknowledges potential additional inclusion/exclusion criteria not explicitly mentioned in the provided text, which may impact feasibility.

power_analysis.assessment: N/A — Phase 1 trial, not powered for efficacy

endpoints.text: Number of participants with adverse events (AEs)
Number of participants with serious adverse events (SAEs)
Number of participants with AEs meeting protocol-defined dose-limiting toxicity (DLT) criteria
Number of participants with AEs leading to death
Number of participants with AEs leading to discontinuation
Number of participants with a complete response rate (CRR) according to the Lugano response criteria for Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma by Investigator assessment
Area under the plasma concentration-time curve within a dosing interval [AUC(TAU)]
Number of participants with a complete response rate (CRR) according to the Lugano response criteria for Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma by Investigator assessment
Number of participants with an overall response rate (ORR) according to the Lugano response criteria for Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma by investigator assessment

adaptive_designs.description: Adaptive design detected: Types identified: Dose-Finding / Phase I.

safety_adverse_events.ae_ascertainment: Not explicitly described (assumed standard investigator reporting)
safety_adverse_events.safety_monitoring: Investigator-reported with sponsor oversight (no DSMB mentioned)

pharmacogenetics.summary: No known pharmacogenetic drug classes or genes detected in protocol text.
